recommendations.title: Birdemic 2: The Resurrection
recommendations.overview: A platoon of eagles and vultures attack Hollywood, California. Why did the eagles and vultures attack? Who will survive?

recommendations.title: The Birds
recommendations.overview: Thousands of birds flock into a seaside town and terrorize the residents in a series of deadly attacks.

recommendations.title: Two Thousand Maniacs!
recommendations.overview: Six people are lured into a small Deep South town for a Centennial celebration where the residents kill them one by one as revenge for the town's destruction during the Civil War.

recommendations.title: Population 436
recommendations.overview: A census-taker is sent to investigate why a certain small town has had the same population -- 436 residents -- for the last 100 years.

recommendations.title: Horizon Line
recommendations.overview: A couple flying on a small plane to attend a tropical island wedding must fight for their lives after their pilot suffers a heart attack.

recommendations.title: Even Lambs Have Teeth
recommendations.overview: Two young women terrorized by a group of small town psychos seek revenge on their tormentors.

recommendations.title: The Manchurian Candidate
recommendations.overview: Near the end of the Korean War, a platoon of U.S. soldiers is captured by communists and brainwashed. Following the war, the platoon is returned home, and Sergeant Raymond Shaw is lauded as a hero by the rest of his platoon. However, the platoon comm

recommendations.title: Feral
recommendations.overview: A wild animal attacks six medical students on a weekend hike in the woods. One by one, they become infected with a “feral disease,” turning them into rabid, bloodthirsty creatures, and the vacation becomes a nightmare as they fight to survive each ot

recommendations.title: Blue Caprice
recommendations.overview: A narrative feature film inspired by the events known as the Beltway sniper attacks.

recommendations.title: Stalingrad
